ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the business unit belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the business unit belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_unit_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit hierarchy */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit */,
  "parent_business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent business unit */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the business unit in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_unit_hierarchy_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_unit_hierarchy_parent_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit generating the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., profit and loss, balance sheet, cash flow) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the financial report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the financial report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial report (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_report_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report history */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the financial report */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_report_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_report_history_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account mapping */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_mappings_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_mappings_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the data belongs to */,
  "account" TEXT /* Account name (e.g., gross written premiums, net written premiums) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the financial data */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_account FOREIGN KEY ("account") REFERENCES accounts ("account_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate associated with the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consolidation_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consolidation adjustment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report the adjustment belongs to */,
  "account" TEXT /* Account name (e.g., gross written premiums, net written premiums) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the consolidation adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the consolidation adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consolidation_adjustments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
